itemListElement.reviewBody: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok ensures the overall development of the students. It not only focuses on the academic front but also on the co-curricular activities which are beneficial for the children. It creates a healthy environment where children love to learn and grow together. The teachers here are loving, kind and well experienced. The ambience of the school is really vibrant.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am incredibly impressed with this School! From the warm and welcoming staff to the enthusiastic students, the positive energy is contagious. The administration’s commitment to innovation and professional development creates an inspiring environment for  both teachers and learners. I am excited to be part of this educational journey!

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: "As a parent, my experience at DPS Sushant Lok has been a constant source of positivity, where I witness my daughter's growth and witness the transformative power of education firsthand. "DPSSL provides the best holistic education that goes beyond academics. They nurture not only my daughter's intellect but also her creativity, character, and social skills. It's a place where my daughter's overall development is given the utmost importance.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: Delhi Public school has a welcoming and inclusive environment. The  supportive  environment fosters diversity, and every student feels valued and respected. This inclusive atmosphere allow students to build meaningful connections with classmates from different backgrounds and cultures, broadening the horizons and promoting understanding.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: Delhi Public School, Sushant Lok is an institution that has very successfully provided an environment for the holistic and all round development of a child. I feel proud to be associated with this prestigious institution in terms of quality education and skill development. The school focuses on the approaches to cater to the individual differences and mould the very best out of every child. Definitely a highly recommended institution in Gurgaon.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: "My association with Delhi Public School Sushant Lok started in 2018, thanks to my son Aarav, who was a bundle of nerves at the very mention of a school at the tender age of four. However, Delhi Public School, Sushant Lok eluded his fears sooner than expected. With teachers who were genuinely like second mothers at the pre-primary stage, my son soon graduated successfully into the primary school. COVID did play havoc for the intervening two years, but teachers kept pace with the learning gaps of the students and reinforced concepts time and again through all possible means. The triple track worksheets that came every month in each subject helped me as a parent to monitor his academic progress. A child looks forward to big spacious playgrounds, AC classrooms and technology-driven pedagogy, all of which get fulfilled here. My son is also a confident TED speaker owing to the mentoring he got in his TED-Ed club. He always looks forward to going to school as there is a perfect balance between work and play. Teachers are warm, peers are supportive and the environment is empowering. As a parent, I highly recommend Delhi Public School, Sushant Lok as a foundational institution for your ward!"

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: I have been associated as a parent with DPSSL for the last 15years and have only great things to say about my experience. My daughter is in the out going 12th grade. I wanted to take this opportunity to thank the wonderful staff of DPSSL for their continuous support and guidance. Especially with the last two years in perspective , I am filled with gratitude towards the teaching staff. They made sure that the academics did not suffer and provided consistent quality schooling through tough times. Highly recommend!

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: It is with great pleasure that I, as a parent, want to say that our journey with Delhi Public School, Sushant Lok has been fulfilling. It is a school that guided my daughters to achieve their best. The students are treated here with care along with inculcation of right values. Good team - Good School !

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: I am a happy and satisfied  parent and my experience with DPSSL has been fantastic. This school has given my children a strong foundation that has helped them develop important life skills.  The school curriculum has always maintained a balance between curricular and co curricular activities. The teachers here are caring and hardworking and ensure through their innovative pedagogical practices that learning happens in a very  friendly and happy atmosphere. Highly recommended.

itemReviewed.name: Delhi Public School Sushant Lok 1 - Sector 27

itemListElement.reviewBody: Delhi Public School Sushant-Lok is the ideal school to take after if one is looking for the perfect educational setting.The administrative team has years of expertise, and the teachers are qualified professionals who set an example for their students. The comprehensive development of children is the school's main priority as the curriculum for them fosters learning beyond the four walls of the classroom.
